name: Humble your arrogant tsareena
description:
Ever since your steenee evolved to tsareena, her once carefree and obedient demeanor haughty and Assertive. Throwing Tantrum when thing doesn't go her way. Perhaps it's about time you remind your bratty pokemon who is the master here?

(art by SaltyXodium)

extra tag: tsundere
creator: terribilis
